arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Leganés
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday's match against Leganés in the return of LaLiga after the FIFA break. Goalkeepers: Lunin, Fran González and Sergio Mestre.

arts.ttl: How Liverpool stars reacted to Trent Alexander-Arnold Real Madrid bombshell
arts.sum: As various reports claim that Trent Alexander-Arnold is on the verge of joining Real Madrid, Liverpool's squad have reacted.

arts.ttl: Barcelona gave up Trent Alexander-Arnold move for 'two reasons' with Liverpool star set to join Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly gave up their pursuit of Trent Alexander-Arnold due to two key reasons, with the Liverpool star set to join Real Madrid this summer.

arts.ttl: Why Vinicius Jr is a worry for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Yet, he has only scored in five league games at the Bernabéu this season : against Espanyol, Villarreal, Osasuna (where he netted his hat-trick), Girona, and Rayo Vallecano. Last season, he scored 15 La Liga goals, nine of them at home across seven matches.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid hopeful over new major triple injury boost for Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Ex-Gunners star could yet return to haunt his old club in massive Champions League quarter-final tie

arts.ttl: Club World Cup prize money: How much Chelsea, Man City & Real Madrid could make
arts.sum: The six South American participants will earn $15.2m each, while clubs from Africa, Asia and North and Central America will take home $9.55m just for qualifying. FIFA have confirmed the distribution of prize money and appearance fees for this summer's month-long tournament in the United States, with 32 clubs reaping the lucrative rewards after qualifying for the inter-continental competition.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid can move level on points with leaders Barcelona in La Liga with a victory over Leganes on Saturday evening. The Spanish champions return to action at the Bernabeu against the relegation-threatened visitors. Barcelona moved three points clear after beating Osasuna on Thursday night, increasing the pressure on Carlo Ancelotti’s side. arts.ttl: Doubts surrounding Real Madrid ahead of key season-end run
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Modric and Camavinga step up as the midfield duo, orchestrating play for a team that will feature three of the Fantastic Four in attack. On the other hand, Brahim is set to start, while doubts remain over Alaba.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Leganes
arts.sum: Real Madrid are back to La Liga action with a match against Leganés at the Santiago Bernabéu.

arts.ttl: Nike Mercurial Superfly 10 Mbappe 25-26 Signature Boots Info Leaked
arts.sum: Nike will launch a new Mbappe signature boot in the 2025-26 season.
